User-agent: *
Allow: /

AudioMaster Lab public SEO routes.
Do not block /static/ because React needs JS and CSS assets to render pages correctly.
Optional: discourage indexing production source maps if they are ever exposed.

Disallow: /*.map$

Sitemap: https://audiomasterlab.com/sitemap.xml
Sitemap: https://audiomasterlab.com/sitemap.txt
